message:
feat(stdlib): Expand all test subdirectories (333 additional files)

Expanded directories (10-15 files each):
- test_email: message, parser, headerregistry, generator, contentmanager, +8 more
- test_unittest: case, loader, runner, assertions, discovery, +8 more
- test_json: decode, encode, default, dump, fail, float, +10 more
- test_sqlite3: dbapi, backup, hooks, transactions, types, +5 more
- test_pathlib: purepath, path, glob, match, parts, +6 more
- test_dataclasses: fields, frozen, hash, init, order, +5 more
- test_inspect: signature, parameter, getmembers, +8 more
- test_concurrent_futures: future, executor, thread_pool, +7 more
- test_warnings: filters, categories, formatwarning, +7 more
- test_zipfile: zipfile64, zipimport, read, write, +6 more

Also expanded:
- test_ast, test_doctest, test_tomllib, test_zoneinfo (10 each)
- test_import, test_module (10 each)
- test_tkinter, test_ttk (10 each)
- test_capi, test_cext, test_cppext, test_gdb (10 each)
- test_pydoc, test_pyrepl, test_tools (10 each)
- test_multiprocessing_* (10 each)
- test_interpreters, test_peg_generator, test_future_stmt (10 each)

Total test files: 1108 (was 775)
